title: Bluebell
description:
The Bluebell mod adds new tools, the Hammers, which make mining easier by digging out an area of 3 by 3 blocks, one block deep.

It also adds emerald equipment (weapons, tools, and armor).
body:
**Bluebell**

The Bluebell mod adds new tools, the Hammers, which make mining easier by digging out an area of 3 by 3 blocks, one block deep.

It also adds emerald equipment (weapons, tools, and armor).

**For now, the textures are inspired on the [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) pack, as I don’t yet have the skills to create them myself.
It’s a work in progress.**

**Available Hammers**

![Hammers list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20d3252da39ece56a1529893e77f996b781b4f09.png)

- Wooden Hammer
- Stone Hammer
- Copper Hammer
- Iron Hammer
- Golden Hammer
- Diamond Hammer
- Emerald Hammer
- Netherite Hammer

**Available Emerald**

What does the emerald armor/items have that the diamond one doesn’t, for example?
Well, the emerald armor/items is slightly more durable.

![Emerald Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/959266ef4b4ac20e2cad662864078d05c725c7dd.png)

- Emerald Sword
- Emerald Shovel
- Emerald Pickaxe
- Emerald Axe
- Emerald Hoe
- Emerald Bow
- Emerald Helmet
- Emerald Chestplate
- Emerald Leggings
- Emerald Boots
- Emerald Horse Armor

The mod also adds several blocks.

![Emerald Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffb300a8d595fb6cd3ec6df1568f995b0db9294b.png)

- Emerald Bricks
- Emerald Brick Stairs
- Emerald Brick Slab
- Emerald Brick Wall
- Emerald Pillar
